Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. More precise elevation data for GraphHopper routing engine 64 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Quantization from the Ground Up 292 upvotes, 50 comments
  3. Personal Encyclopedias 467 upvotes, 90 comments
  4. Two studies in compiler optimisations 97 upvotes, 15 comments
  5. Optimization lessons from a Minecraft structure locator 21 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. The EU still wants to scan your private messages and photos 1314 upvotes, 351 comments
  7. Obsolete Sounds 102 upvotes, 19 comments
  8. Running Tesla Model 3's computer on my desk using parts from crashed cars 709 upvotes, 233 comments
  9. My DIY FPGA board can run Quake II 188 upvotes, 53 comments
  10. European Parliament decided that Chat Control 1.0 must stop 205 upvotes, 60 comments
  11. From zero to a RAG system: successes and failures 113 upvotes, 33 comments
  12. End of "Chat Control": EU Parliament Stops Mass Surveillance in Voting Thriller 97 upvotes, 28 comments
  13. Thoughts on slowing the fuck down 956 upvotes, 424 comments
  14. Shell Tricks That Make Life Easier (and Save Your Sanity) 252 upvotes, 111 comments
  15. Government agencies buy commercial data about Americans in bulk 130 upvotes, 52 comments
  16. Swift 6.3 170 upvotes, 87 comments
  17. Earthquake scientists reveal how overplowing weakens soil at experimental farm 180 upvotes, 95 comments
  18. ARC-AGI-3 438 upvotes, 278 comments
  19. LibreOffice and the Art of Overreacting 103 upvotes, 56 comments
  20. Maxell MXCP-P100 – wireless cassette player 52 upvotes, 27 comments
  21. Show HN: Optio – Orchestrate AI coding agents in K8s to go from ticket to PR 65 upvotes, 38 comments
  22. Niche Museums 37 upvotes, 19 comments
  23. Supreme Court Sides with Cox in Copyright Fight over Pirated Music 374 upvotes, 293 comments
  24. Show HN: Robust LLM Extractor for Websites in TypeScript 57 upvotes, 35 comments
  25. The truth that haunts the Ramones: 'They sold more T-shirts than records' 188 upvotes, 141 comments
  26. Landmark L.A. jury verdict finds Instagram, YouTube were designed to addict kids 87 upvotes, 68 comments
  27. What came after the 486? 82 upvotes, 69 comments
  28. Show HN: Agent Skill Harbor – a GitHub-native skill platform for teams 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. Optimizing a Lock-Free Ring Buffer 12 upvotes, 9 comments
